title: chrysosplenium alternifolium subsp. tetrandrum
intro: Chrysosplenium alternifolium subsp. tetrandrum, also known as the four-leaved golden saxifrage, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the saxifrage family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium alternifolium subsp. tetrandrum include its ability to reduce swelling, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
